i: Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CCNG1 encodes cyclin G1, a p53-regulated cyclin that may have both tumor suppressive and oncogenic functions.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CD200 encodes OX-2 membrane glycoprotein, an immunoglobulin superfamily protein that delivers inhibitory signals to suppress immune cell activation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CD276 (B7-H3) encodes an immune checkpoint molecule in the B7 family; overexpressed in multiple cancers and a target for immunotherapy.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CD33 (Siglec-3) is expressed on myeloid progenitors and is a target for gemtuzumab ozogamicin in AML; variants affect Alzheimer's risk.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CTBP1 encodes C-terminal binding protein 1, a transcriptional corepressor recruited by oncoproteins including E1A and ZEB1.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. Note: CWP1 in the human context may refer to cysteine-rich with EGF-like domains protein or cell wall protein — identity is ambiguous.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CYP3A refers to the CYP3A subfamily (CYP3A4, CYP3A5, etc.) of cytochrome P450 enzymes that metabolize ~50% of clinically used drugs.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CLGN encodes calmegin, a testis-specific ER-resident chaperone required for sperm-egg fusion; mutations cause male infertility.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CAST encodes calpastatin, the endogenous inhibitor of calpain (calcium-dependent cysteine proteases).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CT45A5 encodes cancer/testis antigen 45A5, expressed normally only in testis but aberrantly in various cancers.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CAPZA1 encodes capping actin protein of muscle Z-line subunit alpha-1, which caps the barbed ends of actin filaments.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CA3 encodes carbonic anhydrase 3, highly expressed in muscle; the least catalytically active CA isoform.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CA6 encodes carbonic anhydrase 6 (salivary carbonic anhydrase), secreted in saliva and related to bitter taste perception.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CES1 encodes carboxylesterase 1, which metabolizes drugs like clopidogrel, cocaine, and methylphenidate in the liver.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items with transferrin/lactoferrin hints) with standard 8-item set. CTF1 encodes cardiotrophin-1, an IL-6 family cytokine that promotes cardiac hypertrophy and hepatocyte survival.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CPT1A encodes carnitine palmitoyltransferase 1A (liver isoform), the rate-limiting enzyme in mitochondrial fatty acid oxidation; deficiency causes hypoketotic hypoglycemia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CSNK1A1 encodes casein kinase 1 alpha-1; a Wnt pathway regulator and substrate of lenalidomide-mediated degradation in del(5q) MDS.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. DFFB encodes DNA fragmentation factor subunit beta (CAD), the caspase-activated DNase that cleaves chromatin during apoptosis.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CTSH encodes cathepsin H, a lysosomal cysteine protease involved in antigen processing and tumor progression.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CTSZ encodes cathepsin Z (X or P), a lysosomal carboxypeptidase expressed in macrophages and neutrophils; involved in cancer invasion.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CTSW encodes cathepsin W, a cysteine protease expressed in NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes involved in lymphocyte-mediated cytotoxicity.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CAV2 encodes caveolin-2, a structural component of caveolae (lipid raft microdomains) that regulates signaling.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CDC14 encodes cell division cycle 14 phosphatases (CDC14A/B); involved in centrosome separation and DNA damage responses.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CHN2 encodes chimerin 2 (beta-chimerin), a Rac-specific GTPase-activating protein; variants cause Duane retraction syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CCKAR encodes cholecystokinin receptor type A, mediating CCK's effects on gallbladder contraction and satiety.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. CCKBR encodes cholecystokinin receptor type B (gastrin receptor), expressed in brain and stomach parietal cells.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. F13A1 encodes coagulation factor XIII A chain; the catalytic subunit that cross-links fibrin to form a stable clot.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. COL4A1 encodes collagen type IV alpha-1 chain, the major component of basement membranes; mutations cause CADASIL-like cerebrovascular disease.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. COL9A1 encodes collagen type IX alpha-1 chain, a component of hyaline cartilage; mutations cause multiple epiphyseal dysplasia and Stickler syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items) with standard 8-item set. COL6A1 encodes collagen type VI alpha-1 chain; mutations cause Bethlem myopathy and Ullrich congenital muscular dystrophy.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL7A1 encodes collagen type VII alpha-1 chain, the main component of anchoring fibrils; mutations cause dystrophic epidermolysis bullosa.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL10A1 encodes collagen type X alpha-1 chain, expressed by hypertrophic chondrocytes; mutations cause Schmid metaphyseal chondrodysplasia.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL11A1 encodes collagen type XI alpha-1 chain; mutations cause Marshall syndrome and Stickler syndrome type 2.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL12A1 encodes collagen type XII alpha-1 chain, an FACIT collagen that associates with type I collagen fibrils in tendons and ligaments.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL13A1 encodes collagen type XIII alpha-1 chain, a transmembrane collagen expressed at neuromuscular junctions.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL19A1 encodes collagen type XIX alpha-1 chain, a MULTIPLEXIN collagen expressed in the brain and basement membranes.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL15A1 encodes collagen type XV alpha-1 chain; its endostatin-like fragment has anti-angiogenic properties.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COL16A1 encodes collagen type XVI alpha-1 chain, expressed in skin fibroblasts and smooth muscle cells.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CSF1R encodes colony-stimulating factor 1 receptor (M-CSF receptor), a tyrosine kinase receptor on macrophages; mutations cause hereditary diffuse leukoencephalopathy with spheroids (HDLS).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. C1R encodes complement component 1r subcomponent, a serine protease in the classical complement pathway; mutations cause periodontitis.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. C1S encodes complement component 1s subcomponent, a serine protease that cleaves C4 and C2 in the classical complement pathway.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. C7 encodes complement component 7, part of the membrane attack complex (MAC); deficiency causes susceptibility to Neisseria infections.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CDSN encodes corneodesmosin, a glycoprotein in skin desmosomes; mutations cause peeling skin syndrome and palmoplantar keratoderma.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CRHR1 encodes corticotropin-releasing hormone receptor 1, which mediates the pituitary ACTH response to stress.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CRHR2 encodes corticotropin-releasing hormone receptor 2, which modulates stress responses and cardiac function.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CXADR encodes the coxsackievirus and adenovirus receptor, an immunoglobulin superfamily cell adhesion molecule serving as viral entry point.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CRYBA1 encodes crystallin beta A1/A3, lens structural proteins; mutations cause congenital cataract.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CRYGD encodes crystallin gamma D, a lens structural protein; mutations cause congenital cataract with a characteristic pattern.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCNA2 encodes cyclin A2, which activates CDK2 during S phase and CDK1 during G2/M transition of the cell cycle.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCNB1 encodes cyclin B1, which activates CDK1 to drive mitotic entry; its rapid destruction at the metaphase-anaphase transition releases cells from mitosis.
